title: 2026 Oscars Best Adapted Screenplay Predictions
text: Paul Thomas Anderson is favored to win Best Adapted Screenplay at the 98th Academy Awards ceremony. After receiving 11 Oscar nominations throughout his career without winning, the filmmaker appears poised for his long-awaited breakthrough victory. The article draws parallels to previous coronation moments in Oscar history, noting that the industry decided it was simply his time for directors like Martin Scorsese and Guillermo del Toro. Anderson's film One Battle After Another featuring Leonardo DiCaprio represents his strongest competitive position to date. The predictions indicate that either Hamnet or Train Dreams could secure the runner-up position, though the article characterizes the race as driven primarily by inevitability rather than genuine uncertainty. Anderson's extensive filmography includes celebrated works spanning decades, yet he has never converted his numerous nominations into wins. This year's three additional nominations across multiple categories create what the publication views as a decisive moment for industry recognition. The 98th Oscars ceremony is scheduled for March 15, 2026, hosted by Conan O'Brien.
